runtime_definition.audio_decode_sec: ffmpeg decode to mono 16 kHz float32
runtime_definition.input_prepare_sec: processor input construction and device/dtype transfer
runtime_definition.forward_sec: model forward with CUDA synchronization when applicable
runtime_definition.total_alignment_sec: sum of decode, prepare, forward and alignment decode; excludes model load
runtime_definition.cold_start_total_sec: model load plus first executed sample wall time

evidence_scope: Lightweight index; full per-sample JSON remains external and is referenced by path and SHA256.
